creator: b.nowicki@admin.net.pl
text:
Hello,

We have problem with random kernel panics every few days. More information
on the attached screenshot from KVM - http://wstaw.org/w/lji/. OS version
is FreeBSD 8.2-PRERELEASE #12: Thu Jan 20 15:21:17 CET 2011.

Probably the solution is this -
http://svn.freebsd.org/viewvc/base?view=revision&revision=212803, but
regardless planned MFC is still out of 8-STABLE.

Is it planned to add this patch before final release of 8.2 ?

Fix: 

Same problem described here
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2010-September/019622.html
Attached patch, that was merged to CURRENT may solve this issue.
